name: Upsales Technology AB (publ)
summary: Upsales Technology AB (publ) develops, markets, and sells a cloud-based software and software-as-a-service (SaaS) for CRM, marketing automation, and analysis. Its solutions include CRM that helps the sales team to close more business; Marketing Automation, which helps the marketing department to generate leads; and Engage that helps with processing through targeted advertising. The company also provides training, e-learning, and other support services. It serves customers in IT and software, service companies, media, and financial services in Sweden and internationally. The company as founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
